            DECLARE @fkName NVARCHAR(200);
            SELECT @fkName = fk.name
            FROM sys.foreign_keys fk
            JOIN sys.foreign_key_columns fkc ON fk.object_id = fkc.constraint_object_id
            JOIN sys.columns c ON fkc.parent_object_id = c.object_id AND fkc.parent_column_id = c.column_id
            WHERE OBJECT_NAME(fk.parent_object_id) = 'Funcionarios' AND c.name = 'EmpresaId';
            IF @fkName IS NOT NULL
                EXEC('ALTER TABLE Funcionarios DROP CONSTRAINT [' + @fkName + ']');
            IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('Funcionarios') AND name = 'EmpresaId' AND is_nullable = 0)

FROM [OrdensProducao] AS [o]
INNER JOIN [Produtos] AS [p] ON [o].[ProdutoId] = [p].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Usuarios] AS [u] ON [o].[UsuarioPlanejouId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Usuarios] AS [u0] ON [o].[UsuarioIniciouId] = [u0].[Id]

    SELECT [f0].[Id], [f0].[FichaTecnicaId], [f0].[InsumoId], [f0].[PerdaPercentual], [f0].[QuantidadeNecessaria], [p0].[Id] AS [Id0], [p0].[Ativo], [p0].[Nome], [p0].[PrecoCusto], [p0].[PrecoVenda], [p0].[QuantidadeEstoque], [p0].[Tipo], [p0].[UnidadeMedida]

            SELECT @fkName = fk.name
            FROM sys.foreign_keys fk
            JOIN sys.foreign_key_columns fkc ON fk.object_id = fkc.constraint_object_id
            JOIN sys.columns c ON fkc.parent_object_id = c.object_id AND fkc.parent_column_id = c.column_id

    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [RegistrosPonto] AS [r]
        WHERE [r].[FuncionarioId] = @id) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)

            DECLARE @fkName NVARCHAR(200);
            SELECT @fkName = fk.name
            FROM sys.foreign_keys fk
            JOIN sys.foreign_key_columns fkc ON fk.object_id = fkc.constraint_object_id
            JOIN sys.columns c ON fkc.parent_object_id = c.object_id AND fkc.parent_column_id = c.column_id
            WHERE OBJECT_NAME(fk.parent_object_id) = 'Funcionarios' AND c.name = 'EmpresaId';
            IF @fkName IS NOT NULL
                EXEC('ALTER TABLE Funcionarios DROP CONSTRAINT [' + @fkName + ']');
            IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('Funcionarios') AND name = 'EmpresaId' AND is_nullable = 0)
